"'''To the Vanishing Point'''" is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 6]]''. It features [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]], [[Rivi-Anu]], and [[Eon]] in a battle.

==Plot summary==
[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] sits in his tent on [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]], meditating as drops of water fall softly onto his head. He is drawn back to a time earlier in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], when he fought with [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Rivi-Anu]] and [[Eon]] in a fierce battle. In the middle of the chaos, a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was partially destroyed and fell from orbit, threatening to destroy the entire battlefield. Rivi-Anu, wounded and falling behind, made the decision to sacrifice herself. Exhibiting an exertion of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] that astonished even Ki-Adi-Mundi, the girl held up the starship until everybody has evacuated. Back in his tent, the [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] remembers the life of Rivi-Anu. When [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Bacara/Legends|Bacara]] enters with news that the [[Clone trooper/Legends|troops]] are ready to deploy, Ki-Adi-Mundi rises, his meditation complete.

==Continuity==
In ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', entry [[Rivi-Anu]] and [[Eon]] said they fought on [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]] with [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]].
